title: Teebo's fish friend

{{Quote|We were expecting someone a bit larger.|[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]]|<ref name="ttf" />}}
'''Teebo's fish friend''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] talking [[Fish/Legends|fish]] native to the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. The fish took a home in a lake on the forest moon sometime before or during the [[Rebellion era]], and had an encounter with King [[Elbo]] at one point, perhaps even going to the king's [[Coral Castle]] at the bottom of the sea. He passed this information to three [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]— [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]]— after their friend [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] was kidnapped by the king.

The fish created a sea bubble for the three Ewoks to travel in, as [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] could not travel to the bottom of the sea without air. The Ewoks were hesitant at first, displeased with the bubble's simplicity, but then came around and used the bubble to travel to the [[Coral Castle]]. Later, they rescued [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] from [[Elbo]] after negotiating with him.

==Biography==
===In the Lake===
{{Quote|He checks creatures for greediness and honesty.|Teebo's fish friend on [[Elbo]]|<ref name="ttf" />}}
Teebo's fish friend lived in an Endor ocean around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. The general consensus of the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] was that the fish was abnormally small. Sometime before his meeting with the three Ewoks, the talking fish had at least one encounter with the supposed king of the sea, [[Elbo]]. During this encounter, the fish saw Elbo perform one of his tests for greed, and later the fish saw Elbo's home, the [[Coral Castle]].<ref name="ttf" />

Also, sometime before his encounter with the Ewoks, the fish learned how to make a sea bubble, a round, air-filled sphere that had enough room to fit three Ewoks. The fish could create the bubble by inflating himself with air and then blowing it into water. It is unknown if he used this form of transportation prior to making it for the Ewoks.<ref name="ttf" />

===Helping the Ewoks===
{{Quote|Not bad—a sea bubble.|Wicket|<ref name="ttf" />}}
[[File:Talking_fish_creates_bubble.jpg|180px|thumb|Teebo's fish friend deflates as he creates a sea bubble.]]
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]], an Ewok [[Prince/Legends|princess]], accidentally dropped her [[ankle bracelet]] into the water. [[Elbo]] appeared to her and showed her three bracelets—one that was hers and two others. After correctly identifying her bracelet and resisting the temptation to lie about more attractive ones, she received all three. Later, [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], another Ewok, heard of this story and decided to test it. She purposely dropped her [[Flute/Legends|flute]] into the water, and lied to Elbo. Elbo kidnapped Latara just as [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] arrived.<ref name="ttf" />

They tried to come up with a solution quickly, but it was Teebo who acted. Teebo, having heard legends of sea monsters in the water, allowed himself to float and make noises in the water. Responding to his call, the fish friend surfaced and greeted the Ewoks. The Ewoks explained their problem to the fish friend, and he explained what he knew of [[Elbo]] and the [[Coral Castle]] to the three Ewoks. After deciding to rescue the helpless [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], the fish made a sea bubble in which they traveled. Later, the three Ewoks successfully rescued Latara.<ref name="ttf" />

==Personality and traits==
[[File:Endor_fish_in_water.jpg|180px|thumb|Teebo's fish friend surfaces to help the Ewoks.]]
{{Quote|How's this?|Teebo's fish friend, on his size|<ref name="ttf" />}}
Teebo's fish friend was considered small by many Ewoks, but the fish did not let that stop him from helping taller individuals. He could be summoned for help by making sound and movement in the water, as one Ewok, Teebo, did.<ref name="ttf" />

The fish friend had green scales, red fins, and yellow eyes. He was able to create a sea bubble by inflating himself with air and then releasing that air into the water, creating a sphere that held the air. This bubble could be traveled in, but could not touch a sharp object or the bubble would pop.<ref name="ttf" />

==Behind the scenes==
Teebo's fish friend was created by [[Bob Carrau]] for use in the seventeenth episode of the second season of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']], titled "[[The Tragic Flute]]."

==Appearances==
